task: Fix edu training selected-stage progress bar and Day 0 tab stability

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires mapping the user-visible issue to evidence and verifying the actual runtime entrypoint before reporting done.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard plus at least one real user-facing or runtime verification.

changes: Training header progress now uses the selected stage pct from flow_outline, so Day 0 shows 100% after completion while Day 1 can still show 0%.
Stage switch sync now sends the target stage draft instead of reusing the previous selected stage draft.
Stale claim-training-device responses no longer overwrite newer local stage selection state.
Select-stage sync response is merged back with the clicked stage so the UI does not bounce through the wrong selected stage.

verification.name: macmini edu app production build
verification.command: ssh macmini 'cd /Users/juntaepark/projects/harness-platform && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH" npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app && uid=$(id -u) && launchctl kickstart -k gui/$uid/com.harness.edu-app'
verification.result: passed: vite built dist/assets/index-BxfJuLZM.js and edu-app launchd was restarted

verification.name: production case 72 selected-stage progress
verification.command: ssh macmini python import of harness-os/backend/main.py with _edu_vp_load_state(72) and _edu_vp_refresh_state
verification.result: passed: selected_stage=day0, overall_progress={completed_stages:1,total_stages:2,pct:50}, flow_outline day0 pct=100 and day1 pct=0

verification.name: production launchd services
verification.result: passed: com.harness.edu-app and com.harness.harness-os-backend are loaded

deploy.result: passed: selected paths match origin/main on Mac Mini; production edu-app bundle rebuilt and launchd restarted
